description: Inventory of retained fork-only core patches. fork-drift-check.py evaluates each probe against upstream/main so absorbed features can be removed. Standalone extensions live in DysektAI/pi-extensions.

features.summary: Fork maintenance tooling: CHANGELOG merge driver, rerere setup, sync scripts, docs.

drift.note: Tooling is inherently fork-only; upstream will never carry it. Probe stays ACTIVE.

features.summary: Optional toolPath theme token for file paths in tool titles.
Configurable code block border styles in the TUI markdown renderer.
Bounds vitest worker concurrency to prevent host overload.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream ships its own worker-cap script at this path.

features.summary: Linkify existing file paths in markdown inline code (toolPath color + OSC 8 file:// hyperlink); also carries the vscode://file v2 path-link variant. Bash tool-title labeling moved to feat/tool-call-headers.
Warn when a custom theme omits optional color tokens.
Surface errors via stderr (avoid TUI corruption), add stack traces, preserve OAuth error cause.
Unit tests for previously untested pure-logic modules across all packages.

drift.note: The branch adds parseChangelog/compareVersions/getNewEntries suites to changelog.test.ts plus 9 fork-only test files (ai/{abort-signals,hash,json-parse,sanitize-unicode}, agent/harness/{messages,shell-output}, coding-agent/mime, tui/{kill-ring,undo-stack}). Upstream now ships changelog.test.ts but only covers normalizeChangelogLinks, so the old path-present probe false-fired. This grep flips REDUNDANT only when upstream absorbs the fork's parseChangelog coverage; re-verify the other files before dropping.

features.summary: Deduplicate truncate/messages/compaction utils between agent and coding-agent.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream exports the shared utilities itself.

features.summary: Prefix rendered reasoning/thinking blocks with a bold [Thinking] header so the trace is unambiguous at a glance (pi normalizes every provider's reasoning channel into one 'thinking' type).

Render every tool call as a bold bracketed [X Tool] header on its own line with args beneath (bash/read/edit/write/ls/grep/find + generic fallback), and collapse multi-line bash commands into a single title line.

Open file paths in-window in the VS Code integrated terminal: emit styled plain text (no OSC 8) so VS Code's link detector resolves the file in the active Remote-WSL/SSH workspace instead of failing or opening a new window. isVscodeTerminal() helper kept local to coding-agent.
Interactive /model selector shows the provider first as a padded [provider] badge so model ids align in a column.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream reworks the selector to lead with the provider badge.

features.summary: OpenAI-compatible streams surface a clear authentication-failure message naming the provider on HTTP 401/403, instead of an opaque status-code error.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream adds its own auth-failure messaging for 401/403 in openai-completions.

features.summary: Strip zero-width ghost tokens (ZWSP/ZWJ/ZWNJ) from outgoing text to prevent invisible-character corruption across providers.

drift.note: REDUNDANT if upstream adds its own zero-width ghost-token stripping in sanitize-unicode.
